what_it_does: Records ledger metadata for a design-source image asset identified as capital-raise/p-03 and marks it as source design ground-truth.
observations: The file is a YAML-frontmatter ledger entry for an image/jpeg asset.
Image dimensions w and h are both 0.
The body contains only the caption 'SOURCE design ground-truth — capital-raise/p-03.jpg'.
It carries an author_session and a created timestamp.
standouts: Width and height are reported as 0 for an image asset.
It is explicitly labeled as design ground-truth.
A blob hash is provided but no inline image data.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured asset metadata.
Uses blob://<store>:<hash> references for content addressing.
concerns: Image dimensions are zero, which is inconsistent with an actual image.
No descriptive alt text or content summary is provided.
No links connect this asset to related pages or derived artifacts.
notes: A sparse ledger stub for a source image that has a blob reference and provenance label but lacks dimensions and relational links.
questions: Why are the width and height values 0?
Is the blob hash independently verifiable within this file?
What page or artifact is this image the ground-truth source for?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as a source design ground-truth record matches the caption and metadata; the missing dimensions mean it does not fully describe the image asset.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to catalog and preserve the original source image used as a design reference for capital-raise page 3.
novelty: The explicit 'design ground-truth' provenance label is a distinct signal for source-of-truth tracking.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable ledger entry for a source image, including a content-addressed blob reference and creation provenance that a fused system could use to locate and verify the original asset.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter ledger entry for the design-source JPEG asset capital-raise/p-03, referencing a blob hash, labeled as source design ground-truth, with zero dimensions and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and preserve the original design-source image for capital-raise page 3 with content-addressed provenance.
